name: Columbus Marketing Analytics Meetup - April 2026
summary: Monthly meetup for Columbus marketing analytics professionals. April topic: GA4 Attribution Deep Dive. Lightning talks + networking. Beer and snacks provided.

name: Columbus Marketing Analytics Meetup - May 2026
summary: Monthly meetup: Predictive Analytics for Marketers - Tools, Techniques & Use Cases. Panel discussion with Q&A. Open bar first 30 minutes.

name: Columbus Marketing Analytics Meetup - June 2026
summary: Monthly meetup: AI-Assisted Reporting in 2026 - What's Actually Working? Two lightning talks + hands-on demo. Hosted by Crestline Analytics.

name: Ohio State Fisher College Online MBA Info Session
summary: Virtual info session for prospective students of the Fisher College Online MBA program. Meet current students, learn about the curriculum, and ask questions about admissions and financial aid.

name: Capital University Online MBA Open House - Columbus
summary: In-person open house for Capital University's online MBA program. Tour the Bexley campus, meet the admissions team, and speak with current students and faculty. Light refreshments provided.

name: Fisher College Part-Time MBA Virtual Info Session - Spring 2026
summary: Virtual info session for Fisher's part-time MBA evening program. Learn about balancing work and school, scholarship opportunities, and talk to admissions advisors. Q&A included.

name: Columbus Women in Analytics - Networking Happy Hour
summary: Quarterly networking happy hour for women working in data, analytics, and marketing technology in Columbus. Casual and welcoming for all levels. First drink on us!

name: Columbus Women in Analytics - Mid-Year Summit 2026
summary: Half-day professional development summit for women in analytics and marketing tech. Three keynotes, breakout sessions on career growth, leadership, and technical skills. Lunch provided.

name: Alum Creek Saturday Morning 5K Fun Run
summary: Weekly group 5K (3.1 mile) fun run along Alum Creek Trail starting at the main trailhead. All paces welcome. Post-run coffee meetup at nearby cafe optional.

name: Columbus Marketing Analytics Meetup - March 2026
summary: Monthly meetup: Data Storytelling for Non-Technical Stakeholders. How to present insights to executives and clients without getting lost in the weeds. Workshop format.

name: Short North Gallery Hop - June 2026
summary: Monthly gallery hop in Columbus's Short North arts district. Over 40 galleries and shops open late with special exhibitions, artist receptions, and street performers.

name: Ohio University Online MBA Virtual Open House
summary: Virtual open house for Ohio University's online MBA program. Learn about concentrations, talk to current students, and explore scholarship and financial aid options for working professionals.

name: Columbus Half Marathon Training Kick-Off Run
summary: Group long run to kick off Columbus Half Marathon training season. 8-10 miles along the Scioto Greenway trail. All training paces grouped. Free entry, just RSVP for headcount.

name: Columbus Marketing Analytics Meetup - February 2026
summary: Monthly meetup: Building a Personal Analytics Portfolio - Getting Noticed by Employers and Clients. Lightning talk + open Q&A. Great for early-career analysts.

name: Westerville Farmers Market Opening Day 2026
summary: Opening day of the Westerville Farmers Market season. Vendors selling fresh produce, local honey, handmade goods, and prepared foods. Live music 10am-12pm. Free entry.

name: Columbus Museum of Art - Friday Night Live
summary: Monthly after-hours event at CMA. DJ, cash bar, rotating gallery access, and a live artist demo. 21+ only. A great way to explore the museum in a lively evening setting.

name: Olentangy Trail 10K Summer Run
summary: Informal 10K group run along the Olentangy Trail from Antrim Park south to the Scioto connector and back. Social run, not a race. Bring water. Post-run brunch optional.

name: Xavier Williams College of Business MBA Info Night
summary: In-person information night for Xavier University's MBA programs including part-time and executive options. Meet faculty and current students. Complimentary dinner.

name: Columbus Women in Tech - Resume & LinkedIn Workshop
summary: Two-hour practical workshop for women in tech and analytics. Expert speakers cover resume optimization, LinkedIn profile strategy, and navigating job transitions. Small group format.

name: Short North Gallery Hop - May 2026
summary: Monthly gallery hop in Columbus's Short North arts district. Over 40 galleries and shops open late with special exhibitions, artist receptions, and street performers.
